surfaces.topbar: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/20 sticky top-0 z-50

button.primary: bg-[#2B3FBF] text-white hover:bg-[#1a2d9f] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
button.glass: bg-white/40 hover:bg-white/60 text-[#2B3FBF] border border-white/50 rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-all

badge.base: px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run `npm install lucide-react` or `yarn add lucide-react` immediately.
2. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import link to `public/index.html` <head>.
3. TAILWIND: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the specific colors (royal blue #2B3FBF) and confirm the `content` path scans all component files.
4. GLOBAL CSS: In `index.css`, set `body` background to the Periwinkle Gradient: `linear-gradient(145deg, #E8EDF8 0%, #D4DCF4 100%)`. Set `min-height: 100vh`.
5. LAYOUT: Create a `Layout.js` shell. Sidebar (Fixed Left, 210px), Topbar (Fixed Top, 56px, z-50), Main Content (ml-[210px] mt-[56px] mr-[268px]), Right Panel (Fixed Right, 268px).
6. COMPONENTS: Build `JobCard` using the glassmorphism utility: `bg-white/82 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/40`. Use `font-light` (300) for the Job Title.
7. KANBAN: Use a simple drag-and-drop logic (or library if permitted) but focus on the VISUALS first: 6 columns, horizontal scroll if needed, clear status headers.
8. SCORE CARD: In the Right Panel, the Score Card MUST use the deep royal blue gradient `linear-gradient(135deg, #2B3FBF, #1a2d9f)` with white text.
10. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, cards, inputs).
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'SaaS Blue' except for the specific Royal Blue accent.
Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) inside glass cards.
Ensure text contrast is high (slate-800) against the glass backgrounds.
Use 300 font weight for all large numbers and titles to maintain the 'Airy/E1' aesthetic.
